ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "state_coverage" TEXT /* List of states where the game is available */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was first launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the game will end (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_structures" (
  "prize_structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize structure */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the prize structure belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prize structure */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize structure became active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize structure will be inactive (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_structures_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_tiers" (
  "prize_tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize tier */,
  "prize_structure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize structure the tier belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prize tier */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Prize amount for the tier */,
  "is_jackpot" INTEGER /* Indicates if the prize tier is a jackpot */,
  "payout_method" TEXT /* Method of payout (e.g., lump sum, annuity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_tiers_prize_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_structure_id") REFERENCES prize_structures ("prize_structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_matches" (
  "prize_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize match */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the prize match belongs to */,
  "prize_tier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize tier the match corresponds to */,
  "numbers_matched" INTEGER /* Number of balls matched */,
  "megaball_matched" INTEGER /* Whether the Megaball was matched */,
  "game_drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game drawing for the match */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of prize (e.g., cash, goods) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_matches_game_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_drawing_id") REFERENCES game_drawings ("game_drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_matches_prize_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("prize_tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_matches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "prize_match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize match the winner corresponds to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the winner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the winner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the winner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the winner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the winner */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the winner (encrypted for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_prize_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_match_id") REFERENCES prize_matches ("prize_match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_claims" (
  "prize_claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize claim */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winner making the claim */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the prize being claimed */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_claims_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_payments" (
  "prize_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize payment */,
  "prize_claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize claim the payment corresponds to */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_payments_prize_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_claim_id") REFERENCES prize_claims ("prize_claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_drawings" (
  "game_drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game drawing */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the drawing belongs to */,
  "drawing_date" TEXT /* Date of the drawing */,
  "winning_numbers" TEXT /* Winning numbers for the drawing */,
  "drawing_location" TEXT /* Location where the drawing took place */,
  "drawing_type" TEXT /* Type of drawing (e.g., live, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_drawings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "megaplier_drawings" (
  "megaplier_drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Megaplier drawing */,
  "game_drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game drawing the Megaplier drawing belongs to */,
  "megaplier_number" INTEGER /* Megaplier number for the drawing */,
  "drawing_location" TEXT /* Location where the Megaplier drawing took place */,
  "drawing_type" TEXT /* Type of drawing (e.g., live, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("megaplier_drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_megaplier_drawings_game_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_drawing_id") REFERENCES game_drawings ("game_drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, game manager, player) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_match_stats" (
  "prize_match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize match statistic */,
  "prize_match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize match the statistic corresponds to */,
  "number_of_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winners for the prize match */,
  "total_prize_amount" TEXT /* Total prize amount for the prize match */,
  "average_prize_amount" TEXT /* Average prize amount for the prize match */,
  "max_prize_amount" TEXT /* Maximum prize amount for the prize match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_match_stats_prize_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_match_id") REFERENCES prize_matches ("prize_match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic corresponds to */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players for the game */,
  "total_prize_amount" TEXT /* Total prize amount for the game */,
  "average_prize_amount" TEXT /* Average prize amount for the game */,
  "max_prize_amount" TEXT /* Maximum prize amount for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_payments_audit" (
  "prize_payment_audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize payment audit record */,
  "prize_payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize payment the audit record corresponds to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit (e.g., fraud detection, routine check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_payment_audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_payments_audit_prize_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_payment_id") REFERENCES prize_payments ("prize_payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_claims_audit" (
  "prize_claim_audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize claim audit record */,
  "prize_claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize claim the audit record corresponds to */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date of the claim */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the prize being claimed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit (e.g., fraud detection, routine check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_claim_audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_claims_audit_prize_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_claim_id") REFERENCES prize_claims ("prize_claim_id")
)
